# hrobot_vswitch (Data Source)

Look up a Hetzner Robot vSwitch by its ID, including attached servers and subnets.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hrobot_vswitch" "example" {
  id = 12345
}

output "vswitch_servers" {
  value = [for s in data.hrobot_vswitch.example.servers : s.server_number]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) vSwitch ID.

### Read-Only

- `cancelled` (Boolean) Whether the vSwitch is cancelled.
- `cloud_networks` (Attributes List) Attached Hetzner Cloud networks. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--cloud_networks))
- `name` (String) vSwitch name.
- `servers` (Attributes List) Servers attached to the vSwitch. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--servers))
- `subnets` (Attributes List) Subnets routed over the vSwitch. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--subnets))
- `vlan` (Number) VLAN ID (4000-4091).

<a id="nestedatt--cloud_networks"></a>
### Nested Schema for `cloud_networks`

Read-Only:

- `gateway` (String) Cloud network gateway.
- `id` (Number) Cloud network ID.
- `ip` (String) Cloud network address.
- `mask` (Number) Cloud network mask (CIDR bits).


<a id="nestedatt--servers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `servers`

Read-Only:

- `server_ip` (String) Main IP of the server.
- `server_ipv6_net` (String) IPv6 network of the server.
- `server_number` (Number) Server number.
- `status` (String) Connection status (ready, in process, failed).


<a id="nestedatt--subnets"></a>
### Nested Schema for `subnets`

Read-Only:

- `gateway` (String) Subnet gateway.
- `ip` (String) Subnet network address.
- `mask` (Number) Subnet mask (CIDR bits).
